_source: iDeCo公式サイト / 厚生労働省 — limits as of 2024
_notes_access: Cannot withdraw before age 60 under any circumstances. Minimum contribution period: 2 years.

tax_treatment.contributions: fully deductible from income (所得控除)
tax_treatment.withdrawal_lump_sum: taxed as retirement income (退職所得) — retirement income deduction applies
tax_treatment.withdrawal_annuity: taxed as miscellaneous income (雑所得) — public pension deduction applies

retirement_income_deduction._notes: 退職所得控除 for iDeCo lump sum. Years = ideco contribution years.

lump_sum_tax_formula._notes: Taxable amount = (balance - retirement_income_deduction) / 2. Then apply income tax brackets.
